name: Doom Stone
description: Doom Stone is a gladiator-like sentient stone statue who is one of the SWAP Force Skylanders in Skylanders: Swap Force. His SWAP Force Ability is Spin.
biography: Doom Stone was carved from the strongest and purest stone in Skylands, then magically brought to life by a wizard who was rather lazy and wanted someone strong to carry heavy things and perform other tasks around his castle. Doom Stone happily helped, and in his spare time learned the ancient ways of Stone Fighting should he ever need to protect the wizard, who became like a father to him. Sure enough the need arose when the wizard was kidnapped by his evil twin brother in order to steal his spells for himself. Doom Stone wasted no time in using the skills he learned to save his master. Afterward, the wizard knew Doom Stone had a greater calling and introduced him to Master Eon, who made him a Skylander.
personality: Doom Stone is a fearsome opponent but is always happy to help his friends with any task. He is most likely to appear stony-faced in battle and least likely to stand around.

story.content: Doom Stone was carved from the strongest and purest stone in Skylands, then magically brought to life by a wizard who was rather lazy and wanted someone strong to carry heavy things and perform other tasks around his castle. Doom Stone happily helped, and in his spare time learned the ancient ways of Stone Fighting should he ever need to protect the wizard, who became like a father to him.

Sure enough the need arose when the wizard was kidnapped by his evil twin brother in order to steal his spells for himself. Doom Stone wasted no time in using the skills he learned to save his master. Afterward, the wizard knew Doom Stone had a greater calling and introduced him to Master Eon, who made him a Skylander.

content: The stone is in the zone!
Uh, that name is A-OK...I guess.

trivia: His name is a play on the word 'tombstone'.
The lazy wizard who brought Doom Stone to life once asked Doom Stone to clean all the windows of his home, but Doom Stone's super-strength caused all the windows to shatter to pieces.
He slightly resembles Doctor Doom from Marvel. Both have a grey and green color scheme and have 'Doom' for their names.
Doom Stone, Golden Queen and Crusher are the only Skylanders who can turn their enemies into statues.
He is voiced by Travis Willingham, who also voices the Undead Giant, Eye-Brawl.
Doom Stone, Magna Charge, Rattle Shake and Night Shift are the only SWAP Force Skylanders without any true legs.
Doom Stone and Free Ranger are the only SWAP Force Skylanders with the spin ability.
Doom Stone is the last SWAP Force member to be released.
Doom Stone's 'Column Duty' and 'More Doric Warfare' upgrades are word-plays on the game series Call of Duty and Modern Warfare.
Doom Stone is based on Greek mythology. His clothing/carving resembles that of a Greek/Roman gladiator.
If you place Doom Stone's top half onto Boom Jet's bottom half, you get Doom Jet, which shares its name with Kaos's signature vehicle.

trailers.name: Skylanders Swap Force - Meet the Skylanders - Doom Stone (Another Smash Hit)
Skylanders Swap Force - Doom Stone Soul Gem Preview (Another Smash Hit)

gameplay: Doom Stone is an Earth Skylander from the SWAP Force. He uses a heavy column to bash enemies and can turn them into jade statues by blocking their attacks. His bottom half allows him to spin rapidly, damaging nearby enemies and charging a stone belt for increased power. Additionally, his shield can be upgraded to reflect projectiles and even release enchanted snakes to attack attackers.

basic.name: Column Club
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to swing a heavy column at nearby enemies.

basic.name: Stoney Spin
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to rapidly attack nearby enemies and charge the stoney belt. The belt increases damages and size the more it is charged.

basic_upgrades.name: Living Statue
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 3 to block close attacks. Blocking attacks will cause nearby attackers to turn jade for a short time.

basic_upgrades.name: Reject and Reflect
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 3 to block projectile attacks. Blocked projectiles are hit back at enemies, turning them into jade.

basic_upgrades.name: Column Duty
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 1 to charge the Column Club, release to cause large area of damage. Cause more damage the longer Attack 1 is held.

basic_upgrades.name: Spin Right Around
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 2 to charge a spin, release to bounce between nearby enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Speedy Spinner
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 2 to increase the speed that the belt is spinning. Speed is increased depending on how fast the belt is spinning.

soulgems.name: Stoney Stare
soulgems.content: Hold Attack 3 to block and cause enchanted snakes to come alive on the shield, damaging enemies while you block.

soulgems.name: Spin The Tables
soulgems.content: During the fourth spin, enemies in a large radius are damaged.

abilities.name: Falling to Pieces
abilities.content: Hold Attack 1 to charge Column Duty to release to smash the column and break off smaller pieces of it that damages enemies in a larger area.

abilities.name: Club Doom
abilities.content: Column Duty can be charged even longer, dealing more damage in a larger area.

abilities.name: Cracking Up
abilities.content: Enemies turned to jade will burst, causing small shards to damage other enemies near them.

abilities.name: More Doric Warfare
abilities.content: Hold Attack 3 to block attacks and do even more damage to blocked attackers.

abilities.name: The Harder They Fall
abilities.content: Hold Attack 2 to charge a spin, release to bounce between enemies and knock the last enemy hit into the air which damages them when they hit the ground.

abilities.name: Spinball King
abilities.content: Spin Right Around does increased damage. King of the Spinball wizards!

abilities.name: Jaded Spin
abilities.content: Now shoot jade projectiles at enemies when spinning.

abilities.name: Belt Pelters
abilities.content: Press Attack 2 to spin and shoot powerful jade projectiles at enemies that do increased damage.
